# AML.T0016 — Obtain Capabilities

**Tactics:** Resource Development  ·  **ATT&CK Enterprise mapping:** T1588

## Description

Adversaries may search for and obtain software capabilities for use in their operations.
Capabilities may be specific to AI-based attacks Adversarial AI Attack Implementations or generic software tools repurposed for malicious intent (Software Tools). In both instances, an adversary may modify or customize the capability to aid in targeting a particular AI-enabled system.
